mapper.select:
select * from tbl_label where 1=1
and label_name like concat('%',#{params.search},'%')
and type = #{params.type}
and exists(select 1 from tbl_dish_lable_rel where tbl_dish_lable_rel.label_id = tbl_label.id and tbl_dish_lable_rel.dish_id = #{params.dishId})
and exists(select 1 from tbl_user_lable_rel where tbl_user_lable_rel.label_id = tbl_label.id and tbl_user_lable_rel.user_id = #{params.userId})
order by create_time desc
